8.expected_topics: Properties (Distributivity), finding rational numbers between two numbers.
Word problems based on ages, numbers, and perimeters.
Properties of Parallelogram, Rhombus, and Angle Sum Property.
Pie charts and basic probability from a deck of cards or dice.
Finding square roots by Long Division and Pythagorean triplets.
Prime factorisation method to find cube roots.
Compound Interest formula and Discount/GST calculations.
Standard Identities like (a+b)(a-b) and polynomial multiplication.
Area of Trapezium and Surface Area/Volume of Cylinders.
Laws of exponents and expressing numbers in Standard Form.
Time and Work problems, Map scale calculations.
Regrouping terms and splitting the middle term.
Plotting linear graphs and reading coordinates from a given graph.

9.expected_topics: Rationalising the denominator and laws of real exponents.
Factor Theorem, Remainder Theorem, and Algebraic Identities.
Writing equations in ax+by+c=0 form and finding 4 solutions.
Vertically opposite angles and transversal line properties.
SAS, ASA, SSS congruence rules and CPCT applications.
Mid-point Theorem and properties of Parallelograms.
Angle subtended by an arc at the center and cyclic quadrilaterals.
Area of scalene triangles and applications in quadrilaterals.
Volume of Spheres, Cones, and Hemispheres.
Bar graphs, Histograms, and Frequency polygons.

10.expected_topics: Fundamental Theorem of Arithmetic and proving irrationality of √3, √5.
Relationship between zeroes and coefficients of quadratic polynomials.

10.chapter: Pair of Linear Equations in Two Variables
10.expected_topics: Substitution and Elimination methods; Consistency conditions.
Nature of roots (Discriminant) and solving by Quadratic Formula.
Finding n-th term (an) and Sum of first n terms (Sn).
Basic Proportionality Theorem (BPT) and Similarity criteria (AA/SAS).
Distance Formula, Section Formula, and Midpoint problems.
Trigonometric Ratios and proving identities using sin²θ + cos²θ = 1.
Angle of Elevation and Depression (Heights & Distances).
Theorems on length of tangents from an external point.
Area of Sector and Segment of a circle.
Volume and SA of combinations (e.g., Cylinder + Hemisphere).
Mean, Median, and Mode (Direct and Assumed Mean methods).
Classical probability, Coin, Dice, and Card problems.

11.expected_topics: Union, Intersection, Complement, and Venn Diagrams.
Domain and Range of functions, Cartesian products.
Radian to Degree conversion, sin(A+B), cos(A+B) formulas.
Modulus, Argument, and solving equations with 'i'.
Graphical solution of linear inequalities in two variables.
Fundamental principle of counting, nPr and nCr applications.
Expansion of (a+b)ⁿ and finding the general term.
Arithmetic Mean (AM), Geometric Mean (GM), and Sum of GP.
Slope-intercept form, Point-slope form, and Distance of a point from a line.
Equations of Parabola, Ellipse, and Hyperbola.
Distance formula in 3D and Section formula.
Standard limits and derivatives using First Principle.
Mean Deviation, Variance, and Standard Deviation.
Addition theorem of probability and exhaustive events.

12.expected_topics: Reflexive, Symmetric, Transitive relations and Bijective functions.
Principal value branch and domain/range of inverse functions.
Multiplication of matrices and Symmetric/Skew-symmetric properties.
Adjoint, Inverse of a matrix, and Matrix method to solve equations.
Maxima and Minima (Word problems) and Rate of change.
Integration by Parts, Partial Fractions, and Definite Integral properties.
Area under simple curves (Circles, Parabolas, Ellipses).
Variable Separable method and Linear Differential Equations.
Dot product, Cross product, and Projection of a vector.
Direction Cosines and Shortest distance between two lines.
Feasible region and Corner Point method for optimization.
Conditional Probability, Bayes' Theorem, and Random Variables.
